text:
- Update to 0.13.9
- Patch setup.py to hook in test suite
- Add test: target for running unit tests

- 0.13.9 (2012-08-25)

    Fix for OAuth + POSTs
    Remove exception eating from dispatch_hook.
    General bugfixes

- 0.13.8 (2012-08-21)

    Incredible Link header support :)
